data.title: Bitcoin must secure weekly close above $89K to confirm bottom has passed
data.description:
Bitcoin must close the week above $89,000 to signal an end to the short-term downtrend, says a crypto analyst.“The only way for Bitcoin to confirm that the bottom is actually in would be to close a weekly back above $89K,” crypto analyst Matthew Hyland said in a video posted to X on March 13. Without $89,000 close, Bitcoin may head toward $69,000Bitcoin (BTC) last traded at $89,000 on March 7,...
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-price-weekly-close-89k-bottom-resume-uptrend-crypto-analyst?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Hyperliquid AUM had a single-day net outflow of US$166 million, the second largest in history
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @sankin_eth data panel, on March 12, Hyperliquid AUM (total assets under management) had a net outflow of $166 million in a single day, the second largest outflow in the history of the platform.
This large-scale capital outflow may be related to the ETH multi-whale liquidation incident and the HLP Vault loss of $4 million. Some HLP Vault depositors may choose to withdraw funds due to increased market risks.

data.title: Bybit CEO: The 50x leveraged whale ETH long order liquidation event on Hyperliquid may promote innovation in CEX and DEX liquidation mechanisms
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bybit CEO Ben Zhou posted on the X platform that the 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid liquidated ETH on a large scale, essentially using the platform's liquidation engine to exit. CEX actually faces the same challenge. When whales are liquidated, the CEX liquidation engine will also take over the position. Reducing the overall leverage ratio is one way, and it may be the most effective way, but doing so will hurt the business because users always want to get higher leverage. In addition, although it is also possible to consider deploying tools such as dynamic risk limit mechanisms, such as reducing the total leverage ratio according to the total position size as the position becomes larger, if users use multiple accounts, this problem cannot be fundamentally solved.
If DEX hopes to provide high-leverage services for a long time and avoid situations like the 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid using the platform's liquidation engine to exit, it may need to try CEX-level risk management, such as market monitoring to detect abusers and market manipulators. It is interesting to follow the subsequent development of this matter, which may promote innovation in the liquidation mechanism.

data.title: OpenAI Expands Operator Feature Access in Europe
data.description: According to PANews, OpenAI has announced that its Operator feature is now fully available to Pro users in the European Union, Switzerland, Norway, Liechtenstein, and Iceland. This expansion aims to enhance user experience and accessibility across these regions.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 83,000 USDT with a Narrowed 1.73% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 13, 2025, 06:14 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 83,000 USDT and is now trading at 82,999.132813 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 1.73% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: China Banknote Printing and Minting Group Statement: Never Issued or Sold Any Virtual Currency
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: China Banknote Printing and Minting Group issued a statement, emphasizing that it has recently discovered that criminals have illegally sold virtual currency on some websites and apps in the name of the company.
The group solemnly declared that it has never sold virtual currency through any channel, and reminded the public to be vigilant and guard against being deceived to avoid economic losses.
(Jinshi)

data.title: DB Account Hacked To Spread False News
data.description: According to PANews, the Twitter account DB (@tier10k) has been compromised by hackers and used to disseminate malicious false news. Recent reports regarding BlackRock iShares applying for a spot HYPE ETF have raised doubts about their authenticity. Investors are advised to remain vigilant and carefully verify information sources to prevent erroneous data from affecting investment decisions.

data.title: Token Metrics CEO Says SEC Will Drop Lawsuit
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News, Token Metrics CEO Ian Balina said that the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) will withdraw its lawsuit against it, ending a three-year legal dispute. Balina posted on the social platform: "This is official news: The SEC is withdrawing the lawsuit against me. This lawsuit has never been just about me, but about the fairness of the crypto industry." The SEC initially accused Balina in September 2022 of violating U.S. securities laws by not disclosing his compensation when promoting the issuance of Sparkster (SPRK) tokens. However, the official account of Token Metrics recently stated that the allegation has been withdrawn and hinted that the SEC's enforcement trend may be changing. (decrypt)
